findings.snippet: console.error("Error getting sales analytics:", error)
findings.reason: Client-facing server actions and route handlers must return canonical safe envelopes and avoid raw internal error leakage.
findings.replacement: Use protect, toSafeActionError, or the canonical server-action wrapper instead of raw throws/logging.
